name: @jfun/levelcheck
description: Level QA gates, packaged: frame-fit geometry lint, winning-order discoverability (visible-monotonicity) check, and layout/mechanic distinctness scoring (the anti-clone gate). Engine-agnostic: each game's certifier extracts the facts (bounds, cut order, feature vectors) and these pure functions judge them. Winnability certification stays per-game — engines differ.
